group.title: Groups
group.subtitle: Create a new group or join an active one.
group.creator: CREATOR

scoreboard.title: Group Scoreboard
scoreboard.desc: Ranking the most accurate seekers and masters of deception.
scoreboard.empty: No data recorded for this group.

about.title: Project Info
about.subtitle: Human vs AI Q&A Platform Architecture
about.desc_value: A real-time, interactive game where users submit questions and attempt to guess whether the corresponding answer was written by a real Human Doctor or generated by an AI assistant. Built with complete session isolation, live websockets, and a group-based scoreboard system.

ask.title: Ask a Question
ask.subtitle: Can you tell if an AI or a Doctor answers you?
ask.waiting_desc: The session is currently processing the request. Please wait.
ask.result_was: The answer was actually written by
ask.point_gained: +1 Point for you! The answerer lost 1 point.
ask.point_lost: You lost! The answerer gained 1 point.

doctor.title: Diagnostic Terminal
doctor.subtitle: Review incoming queries and provide human expertise.
doctor.no_queries: No pending queries in the system.
doctor.no_selected_desc: Select a question from the queue to review and submit your official medical response.
doctor.action_desc: You must Accept this question before you can provide an answer.
doctor.answer_placeholder: Enter your response here. Remember: players will try to guess if this answer was written by a human or an AI. Play strategically.
doctor.transmit_hint: Transmitting data securely to central servers...
